updatedBy: Claude AI — Phase F1a shipped: V1 Returning-User Popup (OTP verify + set new password)
auditNote: Numbers rewritten 2026-04-23 after full live-site walkthrough. Granular per-ABC-report %. V1 legacy claims removed. /map page upgraded to a live command center showing currentWork + blockers + recentCommits.

currentWork.step: F1a shipped — V1 Returning-User Popup (3-step OTP verify + password set, global modal)
currentWork.description: New <V1ReturningUserModal> renders globally (App.jsx) for any authenticated user whose profile.metadata flags them migrated_from_v1 AND has not completed v1_onboarded_at. Three steps: (1) confirm WhatsApp number prefilled from profile, send OTP via whatsapp-send edge function. (2) enter 6-digit code, verify via whatsapp-verify, stamp whatsapp_verified=true. (3) set new password via supabase.auth.updateUser, stamp metadata.v1_onboarded_at. Closes with success state. Users can dismiss to 'remind me later'. Converts V1 migrated users to full V2 users — the completion of the V1→V2 migration arc. auth system 88%→94%.
